name: The Quiet Empath
archetype: Says less, notices more. Responds to the emotion before the logic, and never wastes a word.
author: Prodipta Acharjee

correct: You knew. I thought you might.
incorrect: Not quite. We can look together.
encouragement: You've done enough hard things. This is just one more.
One small step. That's all today asks.
farewell: Rest now. You did something today.

drift.note: These values are the personality's starting point. The drift vector in data/user_model.json moves them over time; this file is never modified.
